title: DHCP, DNS, IPv6 Services, and Time · Operations Brief: Net Slaac Dhcpv6
summary: Implement redundant address, name, and time services for clients, infrastructure, and secure operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net slaac dhcpv6 increment in a validated core network-services design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose SLAAC, stateless or stateful DHCPv6, and router-advertisement flags based on address and option needs.
Use DHCP relay or IP helper across routed boundaries and trace discover, offer, request, and acknowledgment evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
